title: EVO-P10-1 composite gap 0.06621 — atlas×laws aligned composite=0.83379 (need ≥0.9 to fire paper_trigger)
rationale: atlas_x_laws_aligned.hexa bin-mismatch bug root-caused (read_file returns empty on missing instead of throwing; stale tmp regression detection was no-op). Fixed: (1) need=true when _probe.len()==0, (2) defensive bin harmonization via truncate-to-min with bin_harmonization field in verdict JSON. Pipeline now runs cleanly from empty /tmp. But composite_aligned=0.83379 unchanged because g_atlas_paircorr.jsonl dates 2026-04-22 and has not been regenerated since atlas.n6_lap_eig grew. Gap to EVO-P10-1 trigger (≥0.9) = 0.06621. Next step: regenerate atlas eigenvalue pipeline (atlas_eig → unfold → pair_corr → wigner_fit) against current atlas shard_meta, then rerun this tool. If still <0.9, try weighted variant (atlas_x_laws_weighted.hexa) or explore other n6 constants encodings (codata17, etc).

evidence_sources.field: EVO-P10-1 task (evo integrated convergence index → 0.9+ target)

refinement_history.diff: initial — follow-up after bin-mismatch fix landed; composite still 0.06621 short of paper_trigger threshold.
